_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: A significantly greater OcS/BS ratio in the trabecular bone was observed in Nf1+/− and PeriCre+ mice than WT and PeriCre+ mice
details: Showed significantly greater osteoclast surface/bone surface (OcS/BS) ratio in trabecular bone compared to WT mice
